name: Chipped Beef Dip
recipeInstructions:
Quick and easy. Serve with chicken fricassee and rice.
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large bowl, blend the cream cheese and milk. Stir in the chipped beef, onion, green pepper, black pepper, and sour cream. Mix well.
Pour into a small baking dish and sprinkle pecans on top.
Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes at 350°F.
Serve hot with chips or crackers.
